Bed Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a limb restraint in bed was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
554 P0100D_OTHR_RSTRNT_BED_CD P0100D_OTHR_RSTRNT_BED_CD P0100D Physical Restraints in Bed: Other Restraint Bed Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that an other type of restraint in bed was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
